seo_description: Calcolatore Logaritmo: inserisci i tuoi dati e ottieni risultati precisi all'istante. Gratis, senza registrazione e facile da usare.
example_label: Calculate log base 10 of 1000 for pH or Richter scale calculations

range_hints.base_log: Common: 10 (common log), e≈2.718 (naturale), 2 (binare); cannont be 0 or 1

result_context: The risultato ({risultato}) is the exponent to which base_log must be raised to get numero; log_natural uses base e (Euler's number).
formula_display: logᵦ(numero) = x where bˣ = numero | ln(numero) = logₑ(numero)
mistakes: Trying to calculate log of zero or negative numbers (undefined)
Using base 1 which is mathematically invalid for logarithms
Confusing log base 10 with natural log (base e)
